title: update azure gptimage endpoints and rename env vars
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Unblocking the canvas
gist.blurb: We've re-routed our GPT image generation through fresh Azure endpoints and added support for the new 1.5 large model. Your prompts are flowing freely again.
gist.summary: Updated the backend Azure endpoints for GPT image generation to improve reliability and introduced support for the new 1.5 large model.
gist.impact: Users will experience restored reliability for standard GPT image generation and gain access to the higher-quality 1.5 large model.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a plumber/engineer, connecting glowing pipes (representing API endpoints) to a digital canvas. The robot companion assists with new tools, representing the upgraded 1.5 model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, connecting glowing lime green (#ecf874) pipes to a large digital painting easel. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head stands nearby holding a shiny new paintbrush. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, nostalgic but beautiful.
